#### What's great [...] #### What's great

Really interesting platform for marketers. I like that Yarnit is not just generating content but supporting the full workflow—ideation, writing, design, publishing, and even performance measurement. The personalization + on-brand training feature makes it more practical for real business use. Would love to see deeper integrations with tools like HubSpot, Mailchimp, and LinkedIn scheduling for a fully automated marketing pipeline.

Sharath C George
Ankita Asthana
